omitted_declarations.policy_reference: | BayutGPT Data | Our 'BayutGPT' feature is powered by artificial intelligence and enables you to ask questions about the service or a specific property you are interested in. You must be a registered user on the Platform to use this service. Please keep in mind that you interact with ‘BayutGPT' through a free-text box, which means that we do not control the information you may input or the response output. |

| Behavioural Data | Inferred or assumed information relating to your behaviour and interests based on your activity on the Platform. This is most often collated and grouped into 'segments' on an aggregated basis. |
